stories.title: The Organisms That Make Earth’s Harshest Places Home
stories.desc: Extremophiles that thrive in the most unforgiving environments aren’t just biological curiosities. Understanding their resilience has many implications for us. The post The Organisms That Make Earth’s Harshest Places Home first appeared on Quanta Magazine

stories.title: Sentinel-3C unpacked
stories.desc: Image: The next satellite in the EU’s Copernicus Earth observation satellite system, Sentinel-3C, has been unpacked from its container at Europe’s Spaceport in French Guiana.

stories.title: Shaping the Emerald City
stories.desc: The hills and basins of Seattle, Washington, have been sculpted by glaciers and modified by humans. The post Shaping the Emerald City appeared first on NASA Science .
